'''pabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yesterminute|yesterminute]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yesterminute|yesterminute]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pabate|pabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pabatesher|pabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pabatesherĂ«m|pabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pabatero|pabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pabateshĂ«|pabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pabateshĂ«m|pabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipabatero|gokipabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipabateshĂ«|gokipabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipabateshĂ«m|gokipabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopabankerom|gopabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopabankeshĂ«|gopabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopabankeshĂ«m|gopabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopabankeya|gopabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pabaterom|pabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pabatemu|pabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pabateya|pabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipabaterom|gokipabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipabatemu|gokipabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipabateya|gokipabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pababate|pababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pababatesher|pababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pababatesherĂ«m|pababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pababatero|pababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pababateshĂ«|pababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pababateshĂ«m|pababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipababatero|gokipababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipababateshĂ«|gokipababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipababateshĂ«m|gokipababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopababankerom|gopababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopababankeshĂ«|gopababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopababankeshĂ«m|gopababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopababankeya|gopababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pababaterom|pababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pababatemu|pababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pababateya|pababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipababaterom|gokipababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipababatemu|gokipababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipababateya|gokipababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠte|pĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠtesher|pĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠtero|pĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠbĂŠtero|gokipĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠterom|pĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠtemu|pĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠbĂŠteya|pĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠbĂŠterom|gokipĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠbĂŠteya|gokipĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafbafte|pafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafbaftesher|pafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafbaftesherĂ«m|pafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafbaftero|pafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafbafteshĂ«|pafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafbafteshĂ«m|pafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafbaftero|gokipafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafbafteshĂ«|gokipafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafbafteshĂ«m|gokipafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafbafnkerom|gopafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafbafnkeshĂ«|gopafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafbafnkeshĂ«m|gopafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafbafnkeya|gopafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafbafterom|pafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafbaftemu|pafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafbafteya|pafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafbafterom|gokipafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafbaftemu|gokipafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafbafteya|gokipafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
